en: The allotment for the tribe of the people of Judah according to their clans reached southward to the boundary of Edom, to the wilderness of Zin at the farthest south.
zh: 猶大支派按著家族抽籤所得的地業，是極南的部分，達到以東的邊境，去到南邊尋的曠野。

en: And their south boundary ran from the end of the Salt Sea, from the bay that faces southward.
zh: 他們南方的疆界是從鹽海的極南部分起，就是從南邊的海灣起；

en: It goes out southward of the ascent of Akrabbim, passes along to Zin, and goes up south of Kadesh-barnea, along by Hezron, up to Addar, turns about to Karka,
zh: 伸到亞克拉濱山坡的南邊，經過尋，上到加低斯．巴尼亞的南邊，又經過希斯崙，再上到亞達珥，繞過甲加，

en: passes along to Azmon, goes out by the Brook of Egypt, and comes to its end at the sea. This shall be your south boundary.
zh: 經過押們，伸展到埃及河，疆界直通到海；這就是他們 南方的疆界。

en: And the east boundary is the Salt Sea, to the mouth of the Jordan. And the boundary on the north side runs from the bay of the sea at the mouth of the Jordan.
zh: 東方的疆界是從鹽海直到約旦河口。北方的疆界是從約旦河口的海灣起，

en: And the boundary goes up to Beth-hoglah and passes along north of Beth-arabah. And the boundary goes up to the stone of Bohan the son of Reuben.
zh: 上到伯．曷拉，經過伯．亞拉巴的北邊，再上到流本的兒子波罕的磐石那裡；

en: And the boundary goes up to Debir from the Valley of Achor, and so northward, turning toward Gilgal, which is opposite the ascent of Adummim, which is on the south side of the valley. And the boundary passes along to the waters of En-shemesh and ends at En-rogel.
zh: 又從亞割谷上到底璧，再北轉到河的南邊亞都冥山坡對面的吉甲去；又經過隱．示麥水泉，直通到隱．羅結；

en: Then the boundary goes up by the Valley of the Son of Hinnom at the southern shoulder of the Jebusite (that is, Jerusalem). And the boundary goes up to the top of the mountain that lies over against the Valley of Hinnom, on the west, at the northern end of the Valley of Rephaim.
zh: 再上到欣嫩子谷，到達耶布斯南面的山坡，耶布斯就是耶路撒冷；又上到欣嫩子谷西邊的山頂，就是在利乏音的北端；

en: Then the boundary extends from the top of the mountain to the spring of the waters of Nephtoah, and from there to the cities of Mount Ephron. Then the boundary bends around to Baalah (that is, Kiriath-jearim).
zh: 又從山頂轉到尼弗多亞的水泉，伸展到以弗崙山的眾城；又轉到巴拉，巴拉就是基列．耶琳；

en: And the boundary circles west of Baalah to Mount Seir, passes along to the northern shoulder of Mount Jearim (that is, Chesalon), and goes down to Beth-shemesh and passes along by Timnah.
zh: 又從巴拉向西繞到西珥山，經過耶琳山坡的北邊，耶琳就是基撒崙；又下到伯．示麥，經過亭納；

en: The boundary goes out to the shoulder of the hill north of Ekron, then the boundary bends around to Shikkeron and passes along to Mount Baalah and goes out to Jabneel. Then the boundary comes to an end at the sea.
zh: 伸展到以革倫北面的山坡，轉到施基崙，經過巴拉山，伸展到雅比聶，直通到海為止。

en: And the west boundary was the Great Sea with its coastline. This is the boundary around the people of Judah according to their clans.
zh: 西方的疆界就是大海和海岸。這是猶大人按著家族所得四圍的境界。

en: According to the commandment of the LORD to Joshua, he gave to Caleb the son of Jephunneh a portion among the people of Judah, Kiriath-arba, that is, Hebron (Arba was the father of Anak).
zh: 約書亞照著耶和華所吩咐的，把猶大人的一份地業，就是基列．亞巴，分給了耶孚尼的兒子迦勒；亞巴是亞衲人的祖先。基列．亞巴就是希伯崙。

en: And Caleb drove out from there the three sons of Anak, Sheshai and Ahiman and Talmai, the descendants of Anak.
zh: 迦勒把亞衲人的三個子孫，就是示篩、亞希幔、撻買，從那裡趕出去；他們是亞衲人的後代。

en: And he went up from there against the inhabitants of Debir. Now the name of Debir formerly was Kiriath-sepher.
zh: 他又從那裡上去攻擊底璧的居民；底璧從前名叫基列．西弗。

en: And Caleb said, "Whoever strikes Kiriath-sepher and captures it, to him will I give Achsah my daughter as wife."
zh: 迦勒說：“誰能攻打基列．西弗，把基列．西弗奪取，我就把我的女兒押撒給他作妻子。”

en: And Othniel the son of Kenaz, the brother of Caleb, captured it. And he gave him Achsah his daughter as wife.
zh: 迦勒的兄弟基納斯的兒子俄陀聶奪取了那城，迦勒就把女兒押撒給他作妻子。

en: When she came to him, she urged him to ask her father for a field. And she got off her donkey, and Caleb said to her, "What do you want?"
zh: 押撒出嫁的時候，慫恿丈夫向她父親求一塊田地；押撒一下驢，迦勒問她：“你要甚麼？”

en: She said to him, "Give me a blessing. Since you have given me the land of the Negeb, give me also springs of water." And he gave her the upper springs and the lower springs.
zh: 她回答：“求你給我祝福；你既然把南地給了我，求你也把水泉給我。”她父親就把上泉和下泉都給了她。

en: This is the inheritance of the tribe of the people of Judah according to their clans.
zh: 以下是猶大支派按著家族所得的產業。

en: The cities belonging to the tribe of the people of Judah in the extreme south, toward the boundary of Edom, were Kabzeel, Eder, Jagur,
zh: 猶大支派極南邊的眾城，接近以東邊界的，有：甲薛、以得、雅姑珥、

en: Kinah, Dimonah, Adadah,
zh: 基拿、底摩拿、亞大達、

en: Kedesh, Hazor, Ithnan,
zh: 基低斯、夏瑣、以提楠、

en: Ziph, Telem, Bealoth,
zh: 西弗、提鍊、比亞綠、

en: Hazor-hadattah, Kerioth-hezron (that is, Hazor),
zh: 夏瑣．哈大他、加略．希斯崙 、

en: Amam, Shema, Moladah,
zh: 亞曼、示瑪、摩拉大、

en: Hazar-gaddah, Heshmon, Beth-pelet,
zh: 哈薩．迦大、黑實門、伯．帕列、

en: Hazar-shual, Beersheba, Biziothiah,
zh: 哈薩．書亞、別是巴、比斯約他、

en: Baalah, Iim, Ezem,
zh: 巴拉、以因、以森、

en: Eltolad, Chesil, Hormah,
zh: 伊勒多臘、基失、何珥瑪、

en: Ziklag, Madmannah, Sansannah,
zh: 洗革拉、麥連拿、三撒拿、

en: Lebaoth, Shilhim, Ain, and Rimmon: in all, twenty-nine cities with their villages.
zh: 利巴勿、實忻、亞因、臨門，共二十九座城，還有屬於這些城的村莊。

en: And in the lowland, Eshtaol, Zorah, Ashnah,
zh: 在高原有以實陶、瑣拉、亞實拿、

en: Zanoah, En-gannim, Tappuah, Enam,
zh: 撒挪亞、隱．干寧、他普亞、以楠、

en: Jarmuth, Adullam, Socoh, Azekah,
zh: 耶末、亞杜蘭、梭哥、亞西加、

en: Sha-araim, Adithaim, Gederah, Gederothaim: fourteen cities with their villages.
zh: 沙拉音、亞底他音、基底拉、基底羅他音，共十四座城，還有屬於這些城的村莊。

en: Zenan, Hadashah, Migdal-gad,
zh: 又有洗楠、哈大沙、麥大．迦得、

en: Dilean, Mizpeh, Joktheel,
zh: 底連、米斯巴、約帖、

en: Lachish, Bozkath, Eglon,
zh: 拉吉、波斯加、伊磯倫、

en: Cabbon, Lahmam, Chitlish,
zh: 迦本、拉幔、基提利、

en: Gederoth, Beth-dagon, Naamah, and Makkedah: sixteen cities with their villages.
zh: 基低羅、伯．大袞、拿瑪、瑪基大，共十六座城，還有屬於這些城的村莊。

en: Libnah, Ether, Ashan,
zh: 又有立拿、以帖、亞珊、

en: Iphtah, Ashnah, Nezib,
zh: 益弗他、亞實拿、尼悉、

en: Keilah, Achzib, and Mareshah: nine cities with their villages.
zh: 基伊拉、亞革悉、瑪利沙，共九座城，還有屬於這些城的村莊。

en: Ekron, with its towns and its villages;
zh: 又有以革倫，和屬於以革倫的市鎮村莊；

en: from Ekron to the sea, all that were by the side of Ashdod, with their villages.
zh: 從以革倫直到海，所有靠近亞實突的城和屬於這些城的村莊。

en: Ashdod, its towns and its villages; Gaza, its towns and its villages; to the Brook of Egypt, and the Great Sea with its coastline.
zh: 亞實突和屬於亞實突的市鎮村莊；迦薩和屬於迦薩的市鎮村莊；直到埃及小河和大海沿岸的地方。

en: And in the hill country, Shamir, Jattir, Socoh,
zh: 在山地有沙密、雅提珥、梭哥、

en: Dannah, Kiriath-sannah (that is, Debir),
zh: 大拿、基列．薩拿 、

en: Anab, Eshtemoh, Anim,
zh: 亞拿伯、以實提莫、亞念、

en: Goshen, Holon, and Giloh: eleven cities with their villages.
zh: 歌珊、何倫、基羅，共十一座城，還有屬於這些城的村莊。

en: Arab, Dumah, Eshan,
zh: 又有亞拉、度瑪、以珊、

en: Janim, Beth-tappuah, Aphekah,
zh: 雅農、伯．他普亞、亞非加、

en: Humtah, Kiriath-arba (that is, Hebron), and Zior: nine cities with their villages.
zh: 宏他、基列．亞巴 、洗珥，共九座城，還有屬於這些城的村莊。

en: Maon, Carmel, Ziph, Juttah,
zh: 又有瑪雲、迦密、西弗、淤他、

en: Jezreel, Jokdeam, Zanoah,
zh: 耶斯列、約甸、撒挪亞、

en: Kain, Gibeah, and Timnah: ten cities with their villages.
zh: 該隱、基比亞、亭納，共十座城，還有屬於這些城的村莊。

en: Halhul, Beth-zur, Gedor,
zh: 又有哈忽、伯．夙、基突、

en: Maarath, Beth-anoth, and Eltekon: six cities with their villages.
zh: 瑪臘、伯．亞諾、伊勒提君，共六座城，還有屬於這些城的村莊。

en: Kiriath-baal (that is, Kiriath-jearim), and Rabbah: two cities with their villages.
zh: 又有基列．巴力 、拉巴，共兩座城，還有屬於這些城的村莊。

en: In the wilderness, Beth-arabah, Middin, Secacah,
zh: 在曠野有伯．亞拉巴、密丁、西迦迦、

en: Nibshan, the City of Salt, and Engedi: six cities with their villages.
zh: 匿珊、鹽城、隱．基底，共六座城，還有屬於這些城的村莊。

en: But the Jebusites, the inhabitants of Jerusalem, the people of Judah could not drive out, so the Jebusites dwell with the people of Judah at Jerusalem to this day.
zh: 至於住在耶路撒冷的耶布斯人，猶大人不能把他們趕走；所以耶布斯人在耶路撒冷與猶大人同住，直到今日。
